hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r p; case "$p" in *public/openapi/*) echo "Refusing edit: $p is generated by scripts/copy-spec.mjs from the sibling civitai-orchestration repo (or the prod fallback). Edit the source spec there, then run 'npm run copy:spec'." >&2; exit 2 ;; *public/appblocks/*) echo "Refusing edit: $p is generated by scripts/gen-appblocks*.mjs from the civitai sibling repo + published SDK packages. Edit the source (or the appblocks-snapshots/ fallback), then run 'npm run gen:appblocks'." >&2; exit 2 ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac }
